text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon shows up before<n>the concert,
seemingly deep in<n>thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, waiting in the wings,<n>Smart Falcon
gives a pep talk to a<n>nervous-looking Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To get on stage is to believe in the<n>power of song
to move hearts. Our<n>second concert begins!
